item.title: Evaluating the forehead temperature for estimating the postmortem interval

item.title: Detection of gunshot residues using infrared photography: influence of ammunition type, surface color and blood contamination
item.dc:creator: Lennart Bedarf
item.description: Bottoni J., Wittig H., Rost T., Schocker S., Wild P., Nachbur U., Neuhaus D., Bedarf, L., Gerlach K., Scheurer E., Lenz C. (2025). Detection of gunshot residues using infrared photography: influence of ammunition type, surface color and blood contamination. Int J Legal Med, 140, 311-321. DOI: 10.1007/s00414-025-03609-9

item.title: Optimized Schlieren imaging for real-time visualization of high-intensity focused ultrasound waves
item.dc:creator: Lennart Bedarf
item.description: Nawrath H., Holl A., Bedarf, L., Mai D., Alfke H., Gröbner J.(2024). Optimized Schlieren imaging for real-time visualization of high-intensity focused ultrasound waves. Biomedical Engineering / Biomedizinische Technik. DOI: 10.1515/bmt-2024-0002
